prompt: Write the home-page A/B test variant C for openpatent.ai. Hero CTA headline = 'Join the hive — 33-agent BFT council watches your invention.' Sub-headline (≤28 words) must (a) name the BFT sovereign-temple v3.0 with its 22/33 supermajority, (b) name the 6 care dimensions, 11 domains, 55 bridge pairs, (c) contrast 1-vs-1 attorney review with sovereign-temple attestation. Three supporting bullets (each ≤18 words) must name: (1) the cross-hive attestation via meok-keystone, (2) the .ai domain portfolio (openpatent.ai, ipcastle.ai, legalof.ai, harvi.ai, sovereign.openpatent.ai), (3) the MCP 33-tool surface exposed at /.well-known/mcp.json. Primary CTA button text: 'Join the hive'. Secondary CTA: 'Meet the 33 agents'. Hero image brief: a council chamber of 33 glowing sigils orbiting a sovereign-temple attestation receipt. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {headline:string, subheadline:string, bullets:[3 strings], primary_cta:string, secondary_cta:string, image_brief:string, signature:string}.
